sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Penal Code (Amendment) Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Penal Code (Amendment) Short title
Act, 2022.

sections.heading: Section 4 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.text:
2. Section 4 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
of the definition of “felony” and the substitution therefor of the of section 4
following:
“felony” means an offence which is declared by this Act or
any other written law to be a felony or, if not declared to
be a misdemeanor, is punishable, without proof of previous
conviction with life imprisonment or imprisonment with
hard labour for three years or more or with life
imprisonment;.

sections.heading: Section 24 of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
sections.text:
3. Section 24 of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
of section 24
(a) deletion of paragraph (a); and
(b) renumbering of paragraphs (b), (c), (d), (e), (f),
(g), (h) and (i) as paragraphs (a), (b), (c), (d), (e), (f), (g)
and (h), respectively.

sections.heading: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 25. Repeal of
sections.text:
4. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 25. Repeal of
section 25

sections.heading: Section 31 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.text:
5. Section 31 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
of the words “not punishable with death” and the substitution of section 31
therefor of the words “not punishable with life imprisonment”.

sections.heading: Section 39 (1) of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.text:
6. Section 39 (1) of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
of the words “sentence of death” and the substitution therefor of of section 39
the words “sentence of life imprisonment”.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K8.00 each.
528 No. 23 of 2022] Penal Code (Amendment)
Amendment 7. Section 40 (1) of the principal Act is amended by the deletion
of section 40
of the words “if of death, fine” and the substitution therefor of the
words “if of fine”.
Amendment 8. Section 43 (1) of the principal Act is amended by the deletion
of section
of the words “suffer death” and the substitution therefor of the
43
words “life imprisonment”.
Amendment 9. Section 63 (a) of the principal Act is amended by the deletion
of section 63 of the word “death” and the substitution therefor of the words “life
imprisonment”.
Amendment 10. Section 64 (a) of the principal Act is amended by the—
of section 64
(a) deletion of subparagraph (ii);
(b) renumbering of subparagraphs (iii), (iv), (v), (vi) and (vii)
as subparagraphs (ii), (iii), (iv), (v), and (vi), respectively;
and
(c) insertion of the following new subparagraph immediately
after subparagraph (vi): (vii) to commit any other
offence; or.
Repeal of 11. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 69.
section 69
Repeal of 12. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 71.
section 71
Amendment 13. Section 118 (1) of the principal Act is amended by the
of section 118 deletion of paragraph (a) and the substitution therefor of the
following:
(a) is, if such last-named person is under sentence of
imprisonment for life or charged with an offence
punishable with imprisonment for life, guilty of a felony
and is liable, on conviction, to imprisonment for life;.
Amendment 14. Section 201 of the principal Act is amended by the—
of section 201
(a) deletion of subsection (1) and the substitution therefor of
the following:
(1) A person convicted of murder shall be
sentenced to life imprisonment or, where there are
extenuating circumstances, a sentence other than life
imprisonment.;
(b) insertion of the following new subsection immediately after
subsection (1):
(2) An extenuating circumstance referred to under
subsection (1) shall not apply to murder committed in
the course of aggravated robbery with a firearm under
section 294.; and
Penal Code (Amendment) [No. 23 of 2022 529
(c) renumbering of subsection (2) as subsection (3).

sections.heading: Section 294 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.text:
15. Section 294 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
deletion of the word “death” and the substitution therefor of the of section
294
words “life imprisonment”.

sections.heading: Section 297 (1)(c)(i) of the principal Act is amended by Amendment
sections.text:
16. Section 297 (1)(c)(i) of the principal Act is amended by Amendment
the deletion of the words “death or”. of section
297

sections.heading: Section 391 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.text:
17. Section 391 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
of the words “death or” and the substitution therefor of the words of section
391
“life imprisonment”.
